name: Lemon Tuna Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter with oil in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add garlic and cook for 2 minutes until fragrant.
3. Stir in lemon juice, capers, and olives; cook another 2 minutes.
4. Reduce heat to the lowest setting.
5. Gently mix tuna (do not flake) into the sauce.
6. Heat through the mixture, stirring occasionally.
7. Drain pasta and add it to the skillet.
8. Stir in the remaining butter and toss until well combined.
